form.formComment: Third race start today. At long odds at debut, second last of 13 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw on January 31 over 1856m, 18 len behind Our Pierro carrying 59.5kg at $26. Second-up 5th of 13 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1717m, slow going 7 len behind Perfect Night with 59.5kg at $151. Hard to make a case for.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Third race start today. At long odds at debut, second last of 13 at Kyneton Mdn-Sw on January 31 over 1856m, 18 len behind Our Pierro carrying 59.5kg at $26. Second-up 5th of 13 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1717m, slow going 7 len behind Perfect Night with 59.5kg at $151. Hard to make a case for.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw September 29 over 1610m, 9 len behind Grand Omaha carrying 59.5kg at $31. First up last campaign eighth of 10 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw September 7 over 1600m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Crown Of Russia with 59.5kg at $26. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Resuming after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw September 29 over 1610m, 9 len behind Grand Omaha carrying 59.5kg at $31. First up last campaign eighth of 10 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw September 7 over 1600m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Crown Of Russia with 59.5kg at $26. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping away shifted out and bumped with Highland Magic.

form.formComment: Last start did the work up front then tired 8th of 12 at Warracknabeal Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 2000m, 6 len behind Think Your Amazing carrying 59.5kg at $51. Before that 2nd of 9 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1600m, neck behind It's All Calm carrying 59.5kg at $5. Keep onside.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Last start did the work up front then tired 8th of 12 at Warracknabeal Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 2000m, 6 len behind Think Your Amazing carrying 59.5kg at $51. Before that 2nd of 9 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1600m, neck behind It's All Calm carrying 59.5kg at $5. Keep onside.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly shifted out and brushed Two Stroke Baby.

form.formComment: Most recently ran last of 13 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1717m, on a slow track; 16 len behind Perfect Night carrying 59.5kg at $101. The race before that got back early 7th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1950m, 16 len behind Sonic Bender carrying 59.5kg at $13. Unlikely to trouble these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Most recently ran last of 13 at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1717m, on a slow track; 16 len behind Perfect Night carrying 59.5kg at $101. The race before that got back early 7th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1950m, 16 len behind Sonic Bender carrying 59.5kg at $13. Unlikely to trouble these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1200m shifted in onto The Last Flash.
Slow into stride. Shortly after the start, shifted ground.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 10th of 13 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Shipstern Bluff with 59.5kg at $61. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at Horsham Mdn-Sw on December 21 over 1800m, slow going 3.5 len behind Star Of Rossa carrying 59.5kg at $5. Prefer to see again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Second run back. First-up after two months 10th of 13 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Shipstern Bluff with 59.5kg at $61. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at Horsham Mdn-Sw on December 21 over 1800m, slow going 3.5 len behind Star Of Rossa carrying 59.5kg at $5. Prefer to see again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 8th of 12 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 2007m, slow going 7 len behind Arabian Prince carrying 59.5kg at $31. Previously second-up 4th of 12 at Horsham Mdn-Sw on May 19 over 2100m, 5 len behind Champagne Jenni with 59.5kg at $26. This hard.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Second-up. First-up after seven months 8th of 12 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 2007m, slow going 7 len behind Arabian Prince carrying 59.5kg at $31. Previously second-up 4th of 12 at Horsham Mdn-Sw on May 19 over 2100m, 5 len behind Champagne Jenni with 59.5kg at $26. This hard.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start bumped by Three Reel Roses.
Bumped on jumping away by Obstructionist.

form.formComment: Most recently 4th in a small field at Gundagai Cl1-Sw on April 12 over 1800m, on a slow track; 1.4 len behind Anladio with 56.5kg at $1.95. The run before that 7th of 9 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on February 18 over 1500m, 5.5 len behind Cannae carrying 59.5kg at $21. Not keen on his chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Most recently 4th in a small field at Gundagai Cl1-Sw on April 12 over 1800m, on a slow track; 1.4 len behind Anladio with 56.5kg at $1.95. The run before that 7th of 9 at Caulfield Heath Mdn-Sw on February 18 over 1500m, 5.5 len behind Cannae carrying 59.5kg at $21. Not keen on his chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced keenly throughout the early stages of the event.
Shortly after the start attempted to buck and lost ground.

form.formComment: Was at long odds at debut, got back early 8th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 2000m, in the wet; 12 len behind Rorkes Drift carrying 59kg at $41. Out of his depth again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Was at long odds at debut, got back early 8th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 2000m, in the wet; 12 len behind Rorkes Drift carrying 59kg at $41. Out of his depth again.

form.formComment: Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, 7th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 2000m, on a wet track; 11 len behind Rorkes Drift with 59kg at $81. Others look better prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Jumped as a despised roughie at debut, 7th of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 2000m, on a wet track; 11 len behind Rorkes Drift with 59kg at $81. Others look better prospects.

form.formComment: At the latest run came from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1860m, head behind Future Frankie with 59kg at $3.10. The start before that settled back and ran on when 8th of 10 at Hobart in the LR Tas Derby on February 6 over 2200m, 5 len behind Dad And Dave with 57kg at $101. Hard to beat on that latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). At the latest run came from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1860m, head behind Future Frankie with 59kg at $3.10. The start before that settled back and ran on when 8th of 10 at Hobart in the LR Tas Derby on February 6 over 2200m, 5 len behind Dad And Dave with 57kg at $101. Hard to beat on that latest effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out rounding the home turn.
Lost considerable ground at the start.

form.formComment: Last start led to the turn then faded second last of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 2000m, on heavy track; 13 len behind Rorkes Drift with 59kg at $7.50. Before that held ground to the line 3rd of 11 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 2000m, head behind Princess Painton carrying 59kg at $21. Among the best hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Last start led to the turn then faded second last of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 2000m, on heavy track; 13 len behind Rorkes Drift with 59kg at $7.50. Before that held ground to the line 3rd of 11 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on March 10 over 2000m, head behind Princess Painton carrying 59kg at $21. Among the best hopes.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 2007m, slow going 1.5 len behind Arabian Prince with 59kg at $15. The start before that gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 7 at Stony Creek Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 2100m, on a slow track; neck behind Mayeki carrying 59kg at $2.05. Well placed to win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Racing well recently. At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 31 over 2007m, slow going 1.5 len behind Arabian Prince with 59kg at $15. The start before that gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 7 at Stony Creek Mdn-Sw on March 8 over 2100m, on a slow track; neck behind Mayeki carrying 59kg at $2.05. Well placed to win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 150m brushed with Mayeki due to both horses shifting ground.
Slow to begin. Laid in under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start raced on the pace when 3rd of 10 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 2124m, 4.5 len behind Washington Lilac with 59kg at $4.20. Before that 4th of 10 at Colac Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1600m, slow going 4 len behind The King And I carrying 59kg at $11. Heading the right way and gets his chance to get off the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Racing well recently. Before that 4th of 10 at Colac Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1600m, slow going 4 len behind The King And I carrying 59kg at $11. Heading the right way and gets his chance to get off the mark.

form.formComment: Last start 7th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1860m, 3 len behind Future Frankie carrying 57.5kg at $101. Before that got back early 6th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1950m, 15 len behind Sonic Bender carrying 57.5kg at $61. Will not find this easy. Better effort last start but looks tested.
